datasets.name: lake_cdc_events
datasets.description: Append-only log of every CDC event captured from the payments source system. Preserves full change history for replay and point-in-time recovery.

schema.data: VARCHAR (JSON) — full row snapshot at capture time

datasets.name: wh_customers
datasets.description: Current-state customer snapshot. Reflects the latest known state of each customer row. Soft-deleted rows are flagged with _deleted=true.

schema.name: VARCHAR
schema._cdc_seq: INTEGER — sequence of last CDC event
schema._deleted: BOOLEAN — true if source row was deleted

datasets.name: wh_wallets
datasets.description: Current-state wallet snapshot. Balance reflects the latest value written via CDC. Negative balances are a data quality violation.

datasets.name: wh_transactions
datasets.description: Current-state transaction snapshot. Each row is the latest state of a transaction from the source. Amount must always be positive.
